original: textify(a||(a=(0,l.Z)(["Few vessels in the galaxy have the manufacturing temerity to be cobbled together from fragments of other vessels, but the Moondast Gruss is one such ship. Boarded via elevator rather than ramp, it’s entrance still bears the marks of the Reaper Armaments cruiser from which it was liberated, welded to an oversized gabilani engine housing above.\n\n\t\tA rusty hatch leads north, to a beat-up workshop, while a bulkhead to the west opens into the ship’s helm."])))

textify(n||(n=(0,l.Z)(["This workshop looks like something pillaged straight out of the Nova. The short ceiling and cramped quarters wouldn’t bother the gabilani that built this ship in the slightest, and their raskvel neighbors would be just as happy to crawl inside. Hookups for equipment are all over, making this a prime location to install any heavier equipment.\n\n\t\tThe only egress is to the south, through a rusty hatch to the boarding elevator."])))

textify(i||(i=(0,l.Z)(["Every ship’s cockpit is unique, but this one is... unique even among the most unique. The ignition looks stolen from an old hovercar. The pilot’s chair looks lifted from a salon, complete with a full recline option. The computer systems are cobbled together from ten different brands and a similar amount of standards, but somehow it all works, booting up with a happy-sounding chirp on command. GobOS isn’t recognized by any major power, but hey, it does the job!\n\n\t\tThe boarding ramp is just east, through a bulkhead. Storage is accessible to the north, down a ramp to a cramped storage space, and the security console sits in the starboard wing, to the west."])))

textify(s||(s=(0,l.Z)(["It’s no surprise that the Moondast doesn’t have much cargo space, engineered for combat as it is, but this diminutive storage still manages to shock you with its sheer lack of scale. Sure, there are a few boxes to pack away a few spare guns and armor in, but you aren’t going to be collecting many prizes from across the galaxy in a ship like this.

		Do you really need to, though? This beast... she wins battles - you hope.
		
		The cockpit is just to the south."])))

textify(r||(r=(0,l.Z)(["The Moondast Gruss isn’t the kind of ship with lots of room for companions, but it does pack a security console - an old Pyrite Industries one. You can use it track down anyone you’ve let onto your vessel - or just make sure there’s no stowaways lurking about.\n\n\t\tYour quarters lie to the north. The helm is east. A small access ladder leads up into the nacelle, where installed upgrades get socketed in. You have no reason to go up there."])))

textify(u||(u=(0,l.Z)(["The Gruss’s quarters aren’t luxurious by any definition. The bedframe is built from repurposed girders, lightly dusted with rust. The bathroom appears liberated from a construction site and retrofitted to work in a spaceship. Even the mirror is made from an old piece of polished aluminum, rather than bought new.\n\n\t\tThe security console lies south, through the door."])))
